title: Reptilator's Bordered Ores
description: A simple Vanilla-Style texture pack that outlines the ores to make them easier to find!
body:
![banr](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4e83458dc8ba4ad23d546a1aa34736f73531fe5.jpeg)

# Never Miss an Ore Again!

Enhance your mining adventures with Reptilator's Bordered Ores—a meticulously crafted resource pack that adds vibrant, high-contrast borders to all ore blocks, including deepslate and nether variants and Ancient Debris. Designed to seamlessly integrate with Minecraft's default aesthetics, this pack ensures that ores stand out distinctly against any backdrop, making them virtually unmissable during your expeditions.​

## Key Features:

- **Enhanced Visibility:** Distinctive colored borders make ores pop, reducing the chances of overlooking valuable resources.

- **Seamless Integration:** Maintains the classic Minecraft look with a clean 16× resolution, ensuring a familiar yet improved visual experience.

- **Comprehensive Compatibility:** Fully supports Minecraft versions from 1.13 up to 1.21.5, catering to a wide range of players.​

Whether you're a seasoned miner or just starting out, Reptilator's Bordered Ores is your perfect companion for efficient and enjoyable mining.​
